section.div: Source code of extensions for the Tachiyomi app.
Source extensions for the Tachiyomi app.
This script will fetch seasonal anime data from MyAnimeList (both Normal and Hentai) and Hentai anime data from NekoPoi and save it in a specified format.
This script will automatically rename any NekoPoi titles (well its for all video titles btw, but mainly used for NekoPoi)
Disini tempatnya projects UKK buat tahun ini ╮⁠(⁠.⁠ ⁠❛⁠ ⁠ᴗ⁠ ⁠❛⁠.⁠)⁠╭

Favorites genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Action, Adventure, Romance

div.div: Inkou Kyoushi no Saimin Seikatsu Shidouroku

There exists a sex life guidance notebook. When someone writes instructions inside and shows them to another person, she will be compelled into following said instructions under the pretex of guidance, as long as they are sexual in nature. Now having fallen into the hands of an unscrupulous and horny teacher, the notebook will undoubtedly be used to indulge in all the hottest girls at his school.

Based on the CG collection by Aomizuan (青水庵). The main character, Seiichi, enjoys traveling to remote islands and is a teacher by profession. He is a teacher, and is a man of immense sexual prowess, but he is not satisfied with his daily life. One day, he receives a request from the chief of an island he knows. He is transferred to a remote island called Koumi-jima, also known as Childbirth Island. The "favor" was... The women of this island have evolved a unique constitution, with only one week between implantation and birth, due to the island's custom of specializing in the role of females, and have continued to thrive in their own unique way for hundreds of years. It seemed as if the island would continue to prosper at this rate, but because the islanders have been mixing only close genes among themselves, it has come to the point where only genes from outside the island can be used to produce the newborns. The island chief's request was for Seiichi, an immensely fertile man with an outside gene: "I want you to impregnate all the girls on the island" That's what it was! The island's custom of specializing in the role of the female, the women want to satisfy the instincts of the men, who from the bottom of their hearts have the idea of male superiority. What will happen to the women who feel the supreme pleasure in pleasing men and giving birth to children when Seiichi appears on the scene?? Note: It has live-action AV adaptations: NIMA-049 (2025/01/31) and NIMA-050 (2025/02/28).
Comedy, Ecchi, Romance, Slice of Life

Takane Takamine is the goddess of her high school. With perfect grades, athletic prowess, and unrivaled beauty, this student council president is the apple of everyone's eye-including Koushi Shirota, a below-average student with no friends or social prospects whatsoever. But he'll soon find out the secret behind Takamine's unbelievable success-her underwear! When she strips, she can undo any of her past actions, and now that Koushi knows, Takamine won't let him off so easy...
(Source: Yen Press)
Saimin Class: Joshi Zen'in, Shiranai Uchi ni Ninshin Shitemashita

Based on the adult game by OLE-M.
Well now LEGEND hair is acting up again in this hentai. With the power of a new hypnotist that is Light Match. Just simply turning on the Match and showing it to the victim will make it hypnotic whenever and anyone will not be able to refuse his orders when it has been hit by hypnosis. One class was all made a victim of his hypnosis. However, there is a surprise when he meets with Sakura-san.
(Source: Nekopoi and Has Been Translated)

A young boy, Mario, is asked by his father, who works for a video game company, to become the GM. Although he is not keen, as a result of his analysis, he realizes that he can experience the same stimulation he received in the game in real life, and as an experiment, he sets his sights on a quiet girl named Koharu Takashina. Koharu wishes to become “a useful and gorgeous character,” which is the opposite of reality. However, the class she is given is that of a prostitute! After being raped by a rough man, her womb starts tingling, even though she is still a virgin in real life...
(Source: PinkPineapple, translated)

Asahi Kashiwagi lives the typical life of an average high school student — until the day a TV fortune teller’s predictions come true one after another, culminating in a series of risqué encounters! Destiny seemingly draws five beautiful girls into Asahi’s path, and soon he finds himself fielding not one, not two, but five love confessions. Asahi will need to follow his heart to find the perfect love for him, or else his love fortunes may end in one epic flail and flop.
(Source: HIDIVE)
S-Rank Monster no "Behemoth" Dakedo, Neko to Machigawarete Elf Musume no Pet to Shite Kurashitemasu

Nobody asked to be a cat!
After dying in a fight against the forces of evil, a knight is shocked to discover that instead of being reborn as a hero of humanity, he starts his new life as a behemoth-one of the most powerful monsters in the world! The only problem is that a baby behemoth looks an awful lot like...an adorable house cat?! Things grow even more confusing when a beautiful elf adventurer rescues him from the brink of death rather than finishing him off. This house-cat-slash-knight's baffling journey is just getting started...
(Source: Yen Press)

When a pregnant young starlet appears in Gorou Amemiya’s countryside medical clinic, the doctor takes it upon himself to safely (and secretly) deliver Ai Hoshino’s child so she can make a scandal-free return to the stage. But no good deed goes unpunished, and on the eve of her delivery, he finds himself slain at the hands of Ai’s deluded stalker — and subsequently reborn as Ai’s child, Aquamarine Hoshino! The glitz and glamor of showbiz hide the dark underbelly of the entertainment industry, threatening to dull the shine of his favorite star. Can he help his new mother rise to the top of the charts? And what will he do when unthinkable disaster strikes? (Source: HIDIVE) Note: Episode 1【推しの子】Mother and Children was pre-screened in advance in Japanese theaters on March 17, 2023. The regular TV broadcast began on April 12, 2023. The first episode has an extended runtime of ~82 minutes.
Tensei Colosseum: Saijaku Skill de Saikyou no Onna-tachi wo Kouryaku Shite Dorei Harem Tsukurimasu

The story begins when high school boy Mikagami, whose only redeeming feature is his skills in video games, is summoned to a different world. He has only the weakest skill "Copy" and, for being useless, he is turned into a sword-fighting slave in the coliseum. Mikagami is pale in the face of the coliseum, where the worst punishment is that "the loser becomes the winner's slave and is mated". The story depicts how he uses his weakest skill "Copy" with the confidence that he has never lost in a "game" before, and how he manages to defeat the stronger players in a duel as if it were a game.
(Source: Comic Natalie)
Ataerareta Skill wo Tsukatte Kasei de Isekai Bijotachi to Ichaicha shitai

That day, Ishida Yamada was working his part-time job as usual. After finishing his shift, he opened the back door and stepped into a vast, empty space, where he encountered a mysterious figure claiming to be God. By sheer chance, Ishida was chosen by this God to be transported to another world. Although confused and uncertain, he resolved to adapt and make a life for himself in this strange new place. Using the skills granted by God, he focused on surviving and thriving. As he explored different lands and encountered various races, he made it his mission to form close relationships with many beautiful women along the way.

YUN-HO starts studying to get a government job after failing to get into college. One day, he has a strange dream and now he can see people's status! [Mission: Punish A Woman] He decides to use his new powers to get revenge on women who's been rude to him... (Source: TOPTOON+)
Rougo ni Sonaete Isekai de 8-manmai no Kinka wo Tamemasu
Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Slice of Life

After growing up an orphan, Mitsuha has a healthy respect for money and a desire to live well—at least, until she dies after being pushed off a cliff. Waking up in a strange fantasy world, Mitsuha narrowly survives an encounter with a pack of wolves, then realizes she has the power to move between this world and the real one. A lesser person might embark on heroic adventures—Mitsuha instead immediately recognizes the lucrative possibilities of her new situation, and heads out to buy an arsenal of modern weapons. Her goal: to acquire 80,000 gold, and the life of leisure she’s always dreamed of!
(Source: Kodansha USA)
